title: Bergen Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Bergen, with a Z-Score of -3.54. This event is rated CRITICAL, with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bergen are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, resulting in a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 13.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 80%, with a gentle wind of 6.5 km/h. 
 The absence of Cooling Degree Days (CDD) indicates that the cold snap is the dominant weather feature.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
